# Dor Tzabari

> Co-founder and GTM operator building AI products.

## About

Dor Tzabari builds at the intersection of AI and product. He is interested in how language models change the way software gets made, used, and understood.

A GTM operator who likes building from scratch. Over 8+ years he has taken products from early traction to enterprise adoption: qualified pipeline, paid POCs, and long-term commercial partnerships across the US, EMEA, and APAC.

He co-founded a smart-city startup (sole-source vendor to Tel Aviv Municipality), and works best at the intersection of innovation, strategy, and execution — building the relationships and systems that accelerate product-market fit.

Former IDF Captain (Yahalom).

Currently focused on creating a startup with massive real-world impact, using AI at the edge of what's possible.

## Contact
